IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (12334140.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced IT professional with over 15 years of hands-on experience in providing computer help desk support, diagnosing and troubleshooting system issues, and maintaining equipment inventory. Skilled in technical training on hardware/software to end users.
SKILLS: Accounting, administrative, agency, Basic Programming, Bookkeeping, Business Communication, hardware, Finance, fundraising, help desk support, IBM, IBM Software, inventory, letters, Lotus 2.1, Macros, Marketing, mail, Office, MS-DOS, Network, networking, Novell Netware, Novell Netware 4.11, page, Programming, express, Shorthand, technical training, telephone, troubleshooting, Typing, Word Processing, WordPerfect 5.1, written
